title: alchemilla indica var. madurensis
intro: Alchemilla indica var. madurensis, also known as the Madurensis lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Alchemilla indica var. madurensis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in creams and salves for topical applications.
